creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 217675
The actual patch I would like to push as port of this update

Hi robak@!

I was about to commit a bunch of updates related to Puppet and updating the Ruby Facter from the legacy 2.x branch to the future 4.x one, and realized that puppet@ did not took maintainership of this port.

Do you mind if we adopt sysutils/rubygem-facter?

Thanks!

Romain, with puppet@ hat
